ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Brief summary of the movie */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was released */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Box office revenue of the movie */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings the movie has received */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or slogan of the movie */,
  "production_companies" TEXT /* Production companies involved in the movie */,
  "countries" TEXT /* Countries where the movie was produced */,
  "languages" TEXT /* Languages in which the movie is available */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID for external reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Adventure, Comedy, Drama) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword_name" TEXT /* Name of the keyword (e.g., melancholy, little dog) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_keywords" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword associated with the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast_members" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "cast_name" TEXT /* Name of the cast member (e.g., Christian Bale, Di Caprio) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the cast member (e.g., lead actor, supporting actor) */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the cast member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the cast member */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the cast member */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the cast member's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_cast" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cast member associated with the movie */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the cast member */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the cast member in the movie credits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "cast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member (e.g., Sidney Lumet, Brian Taylor) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member (e.g., director, producer, writer) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the crew member */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the crew member */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the crew member's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_crew" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member associated with the movie */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member in the movie */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the crew member in the movie credits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, developer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the movie */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the movie */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the movie */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
